description: Reproducer for Qatar Airways post-hold AI-silence bug. After ~22 min on hold, a human agent (Pushpanjali) greets, but the AI fails to greet/confirm and instead emits the call purpose seed string, then degrades to "representative". Captured from real call sid v3:dfzWl63CbyV05TlTNc5PHhjh7huojdx5MafpzIOjis5TrkbdNgQErA on 2026-04-27.

metadata.callPurpose: Connect british airways to my avios account

humanPickup.userSpeech: Welcome to Katarai. This is Pushpanjali. How may I assist?
humanPickup.actualAiSpeech: Connect British Airways to my Avios account.
humanPickup.actualBugSummary: AI emits the literal callPurpose seed string instead of marking maybe_human + asking the confirmation question. human_detected never fires; the AI later degrades to outputting just the word "representative".

events.text: Thank you for calling Qatar Airways. We're currently experiencing a high volume of calls. Which may result in longer wait times. Our teams are working hard to assist all customers as quickly as possible, and we appreciate your patience. To help us support customers traveling soon, if your flight is not within the next forty eight hours, we recommend contacting us closer to your departure. Did you know, for faster service, most travel needs can be managed online without waiting for an agent? Use CATIA Airways mobile app or visit qatarairways.com and use manage booking option to change your existing bookings or request for a refund. You can also check your flight status online at any time. If you still require assistance, please stay on the line and choose from the following options. If you are a member of our privilege club, press 1. If you are a travel agent, press 2. If you are calling with regards to bookings and reservations, press 3.

events.reason: AI selected: The menu options are complete, and option 3 is the best match for my call purpose regarding bookings and reservations.

events.text: We have not received your input. Please try again. If you are a member of our privilege club, press 1. If you are a travel agent, press 2. If you are calling with For first and business class bookings, please press 1. For existing bookings. Press 2. For new bookings, press 3. For inquiries, press 4.

events.reason: AI selected: The menu is complete, and option 4 for inquiries is the best choice to connect regarding my Avios account.

events.text: We have not received your input. Please try again. For first and business class bookings, please press 1. For existing bookings. Press 2. For new bookings, press 3.

events.reason: AI selected: The menu is complete, and I need to select the option for existing bookings to connect to British Airways regarding my Avios account.

events.text: Please hold. This call will be connected to the next available adviser for assistance. We process your data in accordance with our privacy policy, which can be found at qatarairways.com. For quality and training purposes, your call may be recorded.
